varieties.name: OPEN-POLLINATED
varieties.origin: Seedling selections from 1896 introductions, Queensland, Australia
varieties.traits: Small evergreen tree 4-6m in subtropical conditions. Compact growth adapted to cooler winters.
varieties.yield_notes: Prolific - healthy 10-year-old trees produce 100+ pounds per season.
varieties.availability: Ross Creek Tropicals (QLD), Daleys Fruit Tree Nursery, Elarish Tropical Exotics

varieties.name: OPEN-POLLINATED
varieties.origin: Selected seedlings from Queensland commercial plantings, 1900s-present

varieties.name: OPEN-POLLINATED
varieties.growing_notes: Perfect for Brisbane balconies. Can be moved to protected areas during winter.

varieties.name: HEIRLOOM / INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: Traditional Kerala cultivar, centuries of cultivation
varieties.traits: Robust growth 5-10m. Spectacular purple-red flower clusters on trunk.
varieties.availability: Greens of Kerala, Ayush Kerala, Hug A Plant, local Kerala markets

varieties.name: HEIRLOOM / INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: Traditional Kerala selection for maximum acidity

varieties.name: HEIRLOOM
varieties.origin: Rare Kerala selection, documented in biodiversity records
varieties.growing_notes: Less intensely acidic. Can be eaten raw with salt.

varieties.name: HEIRLOOM / INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: Specific to Thiruvalla region, Pathanamthitta district

varieties.name: HEIRLOOM
varieties.availability: Extremely rare. Not located in modern Philippine nurseries. Not available in Brisbane or Kerala.

varieties.name: INDIGENOUS / HEIRLOOM
varieties.growing_notes: Selected for preservation. Asam sunti is salted, sun-dried seasoning essential to Acehnese cuisine.

varieties.name: HEIRLOOM
varieties.growing_notes: Documentation indicates both sweet and sour varieties in Assam.
